name: 生态系统
subject: biology
domain_name: 生态与生物多样性 / Ecology & Biodiversity / Ecology & Biodiversity
curriculum_points: HS-LS2-1: Use mathematical and/or computational representations to support explanations of factors that affect carrying capacity of ecosystems at different scales.

HS-LS2-6: Evaluate claims, evidence, and reasoning that the complex interactions in ecosystems maintain relatively consistent numbers and types of organisms in stable conditions, but changing conditions may result in a new ecosystem.
